scripts.build:pdf: npm run build -w packages/pdf-lib && npm run build -w packages/common && npm run build -w packages/schemas && npm run build -w packages/jsx && npm run build -w packages/converter && npm run build -w packages/generator && npm run build -w packages/manipulator && npm run build -w packages/ui && npm run build -w packages/editor-react
scripts.build: npm run build:pdf && npm run build -w packages/client
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy
